faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Mariners Harbor?
faqs.answer: Mariners Harbor homes typically experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older homes. Our inspection identifies the specific species and customizes treatment accordingly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in Mariners Harbor?
